_source.invalid_reason: Kinship violation — grok-4.5 xAI review P1-A2 (2026-07-13). service=carControl but mounted_tool_name=adjust_ac_temperature_to_number binds to service=airControl per MountedToolServiceMap (live-verified via grep of contracts/semantic-function-contract.jsonl for intent==adjust_ac_temperature_to_number — all 3 hits are service=airControl). The existence check RouteError.unmountedName does NOT catch this because the tool is in mountedToolNames; the kinship gate catches it and raises RouteError.crossDomainMountedTool.
